/usr/bin/ar qc libhft_strategies.a CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/hft/latency_arbitrage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/hft/triangular_arbitrage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/hft/statistical_arbitrage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/hft/momentum_ignition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/hft/order_flow_imbalance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/market_making/basic_market_maker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/market_making/adaptive_market_maker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/market_making/inventory_market_maker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/market_making/grid_market_maker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_strategies.dir/src/strategies/market_making/avellaneda_stoikov.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhft_strategies.a
